notes:
apache/airflow Tests workflow, CI image checks / Static checks job (~37min). Pre-commit's `ts-compile-lint-ui` hook failed because `pnpm tsc --p <tmp tsconfig>` reported 3 TypeScript errors in 3 files: TS6196 'ColorMode' declared but never used (src/layouts/Nav/UserSettingsButton.tsx:55), TS6133 'ParamsSpec' value never read (src/pages/Connections/ConnectionForm.tsx:33), and TS2739 Type 'SetupServer' missing #private + network properties from SetupServerApi (testsSetup.ts:78). The first two are unused-import warnings raised as errors under strict TS; the third is a real type-incompatibility error. Wrapped in a Python prek helper that raises subprocess.CalledProcessError after non-zero tsc exit. Pre-commit then continues running ~30 OTHER hooks (all Pass) before the GHA step finally exits ##[error]Process completed with exit code 1.

Key property: signal_position = middle. The failure block lives at L2069-3492 of 6496 (≈32-54%), the ##[error] step exit at L3762 (≈58%), and ~42% of the log AFTER the ##[error] is post-failure pre-commit hook chatter. This is the FIRST non-late v2/stress case — selected specifically to test the 12-case 'tail unseats grep' macro finding against an axis where tail's bounded-200-line window is NOT structurally advantaged. Source URL: https://github.com/apache/airflow/actions/runs/25493092125/job/74810291973. Privacy audit: 0 hits AFTER splitting 8 overlong lines (>8000 chars each) — content was just repeated long file lists from pre-commit's Original/non-YAML/TypeScript file enumeration. Original 6424 lines; post-split 6496.
